statusLine.command: input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); model_name=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); effort=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.effort.level // empty'); ctx_pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); printf "[1;35m✦ %s[0m" "$model_name"; [ -n "$effort" ] && printf " [0;35m(%s)[0m" "$effort"; [ -n "$ctx_pct" ] && printf " [1;36m%s%%ctx[0m" "$ctx_pct"; printf "  "; cd "$cwd" 2>/dev/null || cd ~; dir_name=$(basename "$cwd"); if [ ! -w "$cwd" ]; then read_only="🚨 "; else read_only=""; fi; if git rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then repo_root=$(basename "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)"); git_branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null); repo_path=$(git rev-parse --show-prefix 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$repo_path" ]; then repo_path="${repo_path%/}"; printf "  \033[1;33m%s\033[0m\033[1;34m/%s\033[0m%s \033[1;32m%s\033[0m" "$repo_root" "$repo_path" "$read_only" "$git_branch"; else printf "  \033[1;33m%s\033[0m%s \033[1;32m%s\033[0m" "$repo_root" "$read_only" "$git_branch"; fi; else printf "🗂️ \033[1;34m%s\033[0m%s" "$dir_name" "$read_only"; fi
